requirement_topic.en: Radio Interference — Radio Act (電波法) and VCCI Voluntary Control
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电干扰——电波法及VCCI自愿管制
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電干擾——電波法及VCCI自願管制

summary.en: In Japan, the electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) and radio frequency interference requirements for EV charging equipment are governed by two parallel frameworks: (1) The Radio Act (電波法, Law No. 131 of 1950, as amended), administered by the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC/総務省), which prohibits the operation of radio equipment that causes harmful interference and sets technical standards for equipment emitting radio waves. EV chargers containing radio transmitters (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth for smart charging) must obtain Radio Type Certification (技術基準適合証明, GITEKI) or Register Confirmation (工事設計認証) under the Radio Act. (2) The VCCI (Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment, VCCI協議会) scheme sets limits for conducted and radiated emissions from information technology equipment, including equipment with embedded computing or communication functions. VCCI compliance is widely expected by the market and major retailers for any equipment with digital circuitry — including EVSE with embedded controllers. While VCCI is a voluntary scheme (not a statutory requirement under the Radio Act), market access through major retailers, charging network operators, and fleet operators in Japan effectively requires VCCI conformity. The applicable VCCI standard is aligned with CISPR 32 (multimedia) for IT equipment and CISPR 11 (ISM) for industrial/power electronics. EVSE falls primarily under CISPR 11 / VCCI-compatible limits for industrial power equipment.
summary.zh: 在日本，电动汽车充电设备的电磁兼容（EMC）及无线电频率干扰要求受两套并行框架约束：（1）《电波法》（Law No. 131/1950，历经修订），由总务省（MIC）管理，禁止操作产生有害干扰的无线电设备，并对发射无线电波的设备设定技术基准。含无线电发射器的充电设备（如用于智能充电的Wi-Fi、蓝牙）须依据《电波法》取得无线设备型号认证（技术基准适合证明，GITEKI）或工事设计认证。（2）信息技术设备干扰自主管制协议会（VCCI）制度为含嵌入式计算或通信功能的信息技术设备（包括EVSE中的嵌入式控制器）设定传导和辐射发射限值。VCCI合规对于所有含数字电路的设备——包括含嵌入式控制器的EVSE——已成为日本主要零售商、充电网络运营商及车队运营商的普遍市场要求。VCCI为自愿性制度（非《电波法》的法定要求），但在日本市场通过主要零售商、充电网络运营商及车队运营商进行市场准入实际上要求VCCI符合性。适用VCCI标准与CISPR 32（多媒体，适用于IT设备）和CISPR 11（工业/科学/医疗，适用于工业/电力电子设备）保持一致。EVSE主要依据CISPR 11 / VCCI工业电源设备兼容限值进行评估。
summary.zht: 在日本，電動汽車充電設備的電磁相容（EMC）及無線電頻率干擾要求受兩套並行框架約束：（1）《電波法》（Law No. 131/1950，歷經修訂），由總務省（MIC）管理，禁止操作產生有害干擾的無線電設備，並對發射無線電波的設備設定技術基準。含無線電發射器的充電設備（如用於智慧充電的Wi-Fi、藍牙）須依據《電波法》取得無線設備型號認證（技術基準適合證明，GITEKI）或工事設計認證。（2）信息技術設備干擾自主管制協議會（VCCI）制度為含嵌入式計算或通訊功能的信息技術設備（包括EVSE中的嵌入式控制器）設定傳導和輻射發射限值。VCCI合規對於所有含數字電路的設備——包括含嵌入式控制器的EVSE——已成為日本主要零售商、充電網絡運營商及車隊運營商的普遍市場要求。VCCI為自願性制度（非《電波法》的法定要求），但在日本市場通過主要零售商、充電網絡運營商及車隊運營商進行市場準入實際上要求VCCI符合性。適用VCCI標準與CISPR 32（多媒體，適用於IT設備）和CISPR 11（工業/科學/醫療，適用於工業/電力電子設備）保持一致。EVSE主要依據CISPR 11 / VCCI工業電源設備相容限值進行評估。

standards_or_laws: 電波法 (Radio Act) — Law No. 131 of 1950, as amended (MIC jurisdiction; mandatory for any equipment containing a radio transmitter including Wi-Fi/Bluetooth-enabled EVSE)

VCCI — Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment, Technical Requirements Document (current edition; emission limits based on CISPR 32 for Class A/B IT equipment and CISPR 11 for ISM/power electronics)
CISPR 11 / JIS C 61000-6-4 — Industrial, scientific and medical (ISM) equipment emission limits (applicable to EV charger power electronics as industrial equipment)

summary.en: China's radio interference and EMC framework for EV charging equipment includes: (1) The Radio Regulations (无线电管理条例, State Council Order No. 672/2016) and MIIT type-approval (SRRC — State Radio Regulation Commission certification) for any equipment emitting radio frequencies; and (2) The mandatory GB 4824-2019 (CISPR 11-based ISM equipment emission limits) and GB/T 18487.2-2017 (EV charger-specific EMC) for conducted and radiated emissions. SRRC certification for radio transmitters in China and GITEKI certification under Japan's Radio Act are separate national type-approval processes with no mutual recognition. Chinese GB 4824 / GB/T 18487.2 test reports are not accepted as evidence of conformity with VCCI or Radio Act requirements in Japan.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备的无线电干扰及EMC框架包括：（1）《无线电管理条例》（国务院令第672号/2016年）及工信部型号核准（SRRC——无线电发射设备型号核准）适用于任何发射无线电频率的设备；（2）强制性GB 4824-2019（基于CISPR 11的工业科学医疗设备发射限值）及GB/T 18487.2-2017（EV充电设备专项EMC）规范传导与辐射发射。中国SRRC认证与日本《电波法》下的GITEKI认证是各自独立的国家型号认证流程，不存在互认机制。中国GB 4824 / GB/T 18487.2检测报告不被接受作为符合日本VCCI或《电波法》要求的合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備的無線電干擾及EMC框架包括：（1）《無線電管理條例》（國務院令第672號/2016年）及工信部型號核准（SRRC——無線電發射設備型號核准）適用於任何發射無線電頻率的設備；（2）強制性GB 4824-2019（基於CISPR 11的工業科學醫療設備發射限值）及GB/T 18487.2-2017（EV充電設備專項EMC）規範傳導與輻射發射。中國SRRC認證與日本《電波法》下的GITEKI認證是各自獨立的國家型號認證流程，不存在互認機制。中國GB 4824 / GB/T 18487.2檢測報告不被接受作為符合日本VCCI或《電波法》要求的合規證據。

standards_or_laws: 无线电管理条例 (Radio Regulations, PRC) — State Council Order No. 672/2016 (SRRC type-approval for radio transmitters)
GB 4824-2019 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment radio-frequency disturbance characteristics (mandatory, based on CISPR 11:2015)
GB/T 18487.2-2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 2: EMC requirements (recommended, based on IEC 61851-21-2:2015)

gap.en: Two gaps apply: (1) Radio transmitter certification gap — EVSE containing Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other radio modules requires GITEKI certification under Japan's Radio Act. Chinese SRRC certification is a completely separate process; no mutual recognition exists between SRRC and GITEKI. Radio modules certified in China must be re-tested and re-certified under the Radio Act before the equipment can legally be placed on the Japanese market. (2) EMC emissions gap — VCCI compliance (while voluntary) is a practical market-access requirement. VCCI emission limits are based on CISPR 11 (for industrial power equipment such as EV chargers) and CISPR 32 (for equipment with IT/communication functions). Chinese GB 4824-2019 (CISPR 11-based) covers equivalent limits for ISM equipment, but test reports from Chinese CNAS laboratories are not accepted under VCCI's registration process — a fresh test campaign at a VCCI-member or Japan-accredited laboratory is required. [Uncertain: Whether VCCI or CISPR 11 is the primary applicable scheme for EVSE in Japan — verify with VCCI Secretariat, as classification of EVSE as IT equipment vs. industrial power equipment affects which CISPR standard applies.]
gap.zh: 存在两项差距：（1）无线电发射设备认证差距——含Wi-Fi、蓝牙或其他无线电模块的EVSE须依据日本《电波法》取得GITEKI认证。中国SRRC认证为完全独立的流程，SRRC与GITEKI之间不存在互认机制。在中国已取得认证的无线模块须在日本重新检测和认证，方可合法投放日本市场。（2）EMC发射差距——VCCI合规虽为自愿性要求，但已成为实际市场准入条件。VCCI发射限值基于CISPR 11（适用于EVSE等工业电源设备）和CISPR 32（适用于含IT/通信功能的设备）。中国GB 4824-2019（基于CISPR 11）涵盖工业科学医疗设备的等效限值，但中国CNAS实验室出具的检测报告在VCCI注册流程中不被接受——须在VCCI成员或日本认可实验室重新开展检测。【不确定事项：VCCI还是CISPR 11是日本EVSE的主要适用方案——请向VCCI秘书处核实，因将EVSE归类为IT设备还是工业电源设备将影响适用的CISPR标准。】
gap.zht: 存在兩項差距：（1）無線電發射設備認證差距——含Wi-Fi、藍牙或其他無線電模組的EVSE須依據日本《電波法》取得GITEKI認證。中國SRRC認證為完全獨立的流程，SRRC與GITEKI之間不存在互認機制。在中國已取得認證的無線模組須在日本重新檢測和認證，方可合法投放日本市場。（2）EMC發射差距——VCCI合規雖為自願性要求，但已成為實際市場準入條件。VCCI發射限值基於CISPR 11（適用於EVSE等工業電源設備）和CISPR 32（適用於含IT/通訊功能的設備）。中國GB 4824-2019（基於CISPR 11）涵蓋工業科學醫療設備的等效限值，但中國CNAS實驗室出具的檢測報告在VCCI注冊流程中不被接受——須在VCCI成員或日本認可實驗室重新開展檢測。【不確定事項：VCCI還是CISPR 11是日本EVSE的主要適用方案——請向VCCI秘書處核實，因將EVSE歸類為IT設備還是工業電源設備將影響適用的CISPR標準。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for radio transmitters under the Radio Act (GITEKI); VCCI is voluntary but effectively mandatory for market access through major Japanese distribution channels and charging network operators
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory SRRC type-approval for radio transmitters (MIIT); GB 4824-2019 mandatory for ISM equipment emissions; GB/T 18487.2-2017 recommended but applied in CCC type-testing

source.publisher: VCCI — Voluntary Control Council for Interference by Information Technology Equipment, Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EVSE containing radio modules (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) must obtain GITEKI certification under Japan's Radio Act — Chinese SRRC certification does not satisfy this requirement. VCCI registration, while voluntary, is a practical market-access requirement in Japan; Chinese GB 4824 / GB/T 18487.2 test reports are not accepted for VCCI registration. Re-testing at a Japan-recognised laboratory is required for both pathways. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 含无线电模块（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）的EVSE须依据日本《电波法》取得GITEKI认证——中国SRRC认证不满足此要求。VCCI注册虽为自愿性要求，但已成为日本市场准入的实际条件；中国GB 4824 / GB/T 18487.2检测报告不被接受用于VCCI注册。两条路径均须在日本认可实验室重新检测。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 含無線電模組（Wi-Fi、藍牙）的EVSE須依據日本《電波法》取得GITEKI認證——中國SRRC認證不滿足此要求。VCCI注冊雖為自願性要求，但已成為日本市場準入的實際條件；中國GB 4824 / GB/T 18487.2檢測報告不被接受用於VCCI注冊。兩條路徑均須在日本認可實驗室重新檢測。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
